gap_10_ips.description: Position bias correction via IPS sample weights

gap_1_two_tower.description: Sequence-aware neural candidate generation — SASRec context merged into Query Tower for sequential retrieval

l1.description: Primary ranking model with position bias correction (Gap 10)

gap_3_sasrec.output: 16-dim sequential context embedding merged into Query Tower + L1/L2
gap_3_sasrec.description: Sequential model runs FIRST — enriches retrieval, L1 ranking, and L2 re-ranking with cart sequence awareness

gap_2_dcnv2.description: Real neural DCN-v2 with learned cross layers and deep MLP

gap_5_mmr.constraints: max 2 items/category, min 2 categories in top 5
gap_5_mmr.frequency_cap: max 3 impressions per item per day
gap_5_mmr.description: Diversity-aware re-ranking with frequency capping, impression decay, and session novelty

implemented: Two-Tower neural retrieval with FAISS ANN (Gap 1)
SASRec sequential context merged INTO Query Tower (Gap 3 + Gap 1)
Attention-weighted cart pooling in query tower (Gap 1)
LogQ popularity bias correction in retrieval (Gap 1)
Real PyTorch DCN-v2 with learned cross layers (Gap 2)
TF-IDF text embeddings as proxy for sentence-transformer embeddings
Semantic similarity features between cart and candidate items
production_upgrade: Use LLM (GPT-4/Claude) for cuisine-specific complementarity graphs
Real-time embedding updates for new menu items
Distributed FAISS with IVF indexing for production scale
Online SASRec with streaming cart updates
